name: EgoVLP (EgoClip / EgoNCE / EgoMCQ)
data_access: project-script (EgoClip CSV via Google Drive in repo; Ego4D videos obtained separately)
downloadable: open CSV (Ego4D-derived) via repo Drive links
license: code MIT; data inherits Ego4D License
redistribution: restricted: EgoClip text is Ego4D-derived and inherits the gated Ego4D License, so the strings are not republished here
suitability: download+cluster target: egoclip.csv gives ~3.8M narration strings (Ego4D-derived)
focus_en: A pre-filtered, cleaned text layer over Ego4D: about 3.8M clip-text pairs (EgoClip) plus the EgoNCE objective and the EgoMCQ choice benchmark.
focus_cn: Ego4D 之上的预过滤、清洗文本层：约 380 万条片段-文本对（EgoClip），外加 EgoNCE 目标与 EgoMCQ 选择题基准。
datapath_en: EgoVLP is an egocentric video-language pretraining method built on Ego4D. The authors construct EgoClip, a cleaned and filtered text layer over Ego4D narrations that yields about 3.8 million clip-text pairs with verb and noun tags and timestamps. A dual encoder is pretrained with the EgoNCE objective, a contrastive loss aware of verb-noun semantics and narration synonyms, and validated on EgoMCQ, an inter-video and intra-video multiple-choice benchmark. Because EgoClip is derived from Ego4D narrations and inherits the Ego4D License, the strings are not redistributed in this atlas.
datapath_cn: EgoVLP 是构建在 Ego4D 之上的第一人称视频-语言预训练方法。作者构建了 EgoClip，即对 Ego4D 旁白进行清洗与过滤的文本层，生成约 380 万条带动词、名词标签与时间戳的片段-文本对。模型以 EgoNCE 目标预训练双编码器（一种感知动词-名词语义与旁白同义词的对比损失），并在 EgoMCQ（视频间与视频内选择题）上验证。由于 EgoClip 派生自 Ego4D 旁白并继承 Ego4D 许可，其字符串不在本图谱中再分发。
flow_cn: EgoClip：清洗后约 380 万片段-文本对
用 EgoNCE 预训练双编码器
no_corpus_en: EgoClip is openly downloadable as a CSV, but its text is a filtered layer over Ego4D narrations and inherits the gated Ego4D License, which restricts redistribution, and EgoVLP consumes rather than originates the language. The corpus can be analyzed locally after obtaining Ego4D, so the entry is documented descriptively with links to the source rather than embedding Ego4D-derived strings.
no_corpus_cn: EgoClip 以 CSV 形式公开可下载，但其文本是对 Ego4D 旁白过滤后的层，继承受限的 Ego4D 许可，限制再分发；且 EgoVLP 是消费而非原创语言。获取 Ego4D 后可在本地分析该语料，因此本条目以描述性方式记录并链接到来源，而不内嵌 Ego4D 派生的字符串。
example_credit: EgoVLP, Lin et al., NeurIPS 2022 (derived from Ego4D)
example_caption_en: EgoVLP pretrains on Ego4D clip-text pairs; the repository figures show egocentric frames used in the EgoMCQ benchmark.
example_caption_cn: EgoVLP 在 Ego4D 片段-文本对上预训练；仓库图示展示了 EgoMCQ 基准中使用的第一人称画面。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2206.01670, qhlin.me/EgoVLP, and github.com/showlab/EgoVLP (code MIT). EgoClip text inherits the Ego4D License.
citation: Lin et al., Egocentric Video-Language Pretraining, NeurIPS 2022 (arXiv:2206.01670).
